raw_consumer_statement: I received an email showing my credit card payment was past due. I hadnt used my card since paying the balance in its entirety in XXXX. I filed a fraud investigation on XX/XX/XXXX. when I noticed that a lot of the transactions were credited to my account but not all on my XXXX statement I reached out XXXX additional times in which case they told me that all of the charges were still being investigated. I received calls from bill collectors stating that my bill was past due but every time I called my Best Buy card services I was told that it was still under investigation and to ignore the calls. My credit score has been greatly affected. XXXX XXXX received a letter stating that everything was resolved on XX/XX/XXXX but it did not cover all the charges I disputed but when I called Im still being told that the charges are under investigation and there is nothing further for me to do
